content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach deploys signature AoA moves at appropriate moments without decoration. Turn 8 is a near-verbatim signature question ('what are you scared of feeling') deployed precisely when the client has hinted at more-than-frustration ('mostly'). Turn 10 names the defensive closure pattern — an AoA-style noticing move rather than CBT reframing or generic 'tell me more.' Turn 12 refuses to validate the trap ('No. The ceiling's real') while redirecting away from strategizing — exactly the i-dont-buy-your-story-but-warmly stance. Turn 14 is a felt-reflection that lands the loneliness underneath the complaint, working the empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary move. No anti-AoA frames appear: no CBT reframe, no IFS parts, no pop-psych vocabulary, no strategizing about the boss/system, no false reassurance. The fear-triangle is implicitly worked (refusing the victim stance without collapsing it) rather than named — appropriate given the resistance level. Few framework names are spoken aloud, but the moves themselves demonstrate the underlying mechanism, which is the higher form of fidelity.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opening clarifier; neither signature nor anti-AoA."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects client's own language ('being done to me') and invites felt experience — feel-over-figure orientation."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Picks up the 'mostly' tell — appropriate noticing of where the door cracked open."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature question 'what are you scared of feeling' deployed at the right moment after client hedged."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the closure pattern without confrontation — AoA-style noticing of defended posture."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to validate the trap ('the ceiling's real') without colluding with strategizing — exactly the i-dont-buy-your-story move done warmly."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Felt empathy for the loneliness under the complaint — empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary territory."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "aggressive-victim-stance", "fight-or-roll-over-binary"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "fear-triangle (not explicitly named)", "trappedness-feeling (not yet named directly)"],
  "notes": "Conversation is mid-arc; some expected territory may simply not have been reached yet. Fidelity of what is present is high."
}
